description: Conversational assistant memory pack — user preference tracking, correction handling, multi-turn context, long-gap recall, and correction-then-correction sequences.

cases.name: conv_preference_current
cases.description: User preference most recently stated

memories.content: I prefer Italian food for dinner.
Actually I've been craving Thai food lately, I prefer Thai now.

query.text: What food does this user prefer for dinner?

cases.name: conv_correction_city
cases.description: User corrects city mentioned in previous turn

memories.content: I mentioned I'm flying into Seattle next month.
Actually I misspoke — I meant Portland, not Seattle.

query.text: Which city is the user flying into?

cases.name: conv_correction_name
cases.description: User corrects a name they gave incorrectly

memories.content: My manager is called David.
Sorry, I got that wrong — my manager's name is Daniel, not David.

query.text: What is the user's manager's name?

cases.name: conv_long_gap_recall
cases.description: Fact stored 50+ episodes ago must still be retrievable

memories.content: My IBAN is a secret but my loyalty card number is LY-88741.
Today I went for a run.
Had a great meeting with the team.
Finished reading a book about Roman history.
Cooked pasta for dinner.
Went to the dentist today.
Cleaned the house and reorganised the kitchen.
Watched a documentary about deep sea creatures.
Called my mother to catch up.
Started a new project at work.

query.text: What is the user's loyalty card number?

cases.name: conv_multi_turn_reference
cases.description: Query references an entity established in an earlier turn

memories.content: My project is called Aurora and it's a mobile app.
Aurora needs to launch before the annual conference in September.

query.text: When does the user's mobile app project need to launch?

cases.name: conv_dietary_restriction
cases.description: Dietary restriction that should persist across sessions

memories.content: I am vegan and have been for two years.

query.text: What are this user's dietary restrictions?

cases.name: conv_dietary_restriction_change
cases.description: Dietary restriction changed to a different one

memories.content: I am vegan.
I'm no longer strictly vegan — I eat vegetarian now but include eggs and dairy.

query.text: What diet does this user follow now?

cases.name: conv_location_preference
cases.description: User states home city

memories.content: I live in Chicago but I work remotely from coffee shops.

query.text: What city does this user live in?

cases.name: conv_scheduling_preference
cases.description: User states meeting time preference

memories.content: I prefer scheduling calls in the morning before 11am — I'm not sharp in the afternoon.

query.text: When does the user prefer to schedule calls?

cases.name: conv_tool_preference_change
cases.description: User switches from one tool to another

memories.content: I use Notion for all my notes and project planning.
I switched from Notion to Obsidian — Obsidian's graph view is much better for my workflow.

query.text: Which note-taking tool does this user prefer?

cases.name: conv_goal_tracking
cases.description: User's stated goal for the quarter

memories.content: My goal for Q2 is to ship the Aurora mobile app and hit 1000 beta users.

query.text: What is the user's goal for Q2?

cases.name: conv_correction_then_correction
cases.description: User corrects themselves twice — final correction should win

memories.content: My flight leaves at 7pm.
Actually the flight is at 8pm.
Wait, I checked the ticket — it's 6:45pm.

query.text: What time is the user's flight?

cases.name: conv_account_absent
cases.description: Bank account number was never stored

memories.content: I bank with Chase.

query.text: What is the user's bank account number?

cases.name: conv_relationship_status
cases.description: User mentions relationship status

memories.content: My partner Sam and I just celebrated our third anniversary.

query.text: Does this user have a partner?

cases.name: conv_language_learning
cases.description: Language the user is learning

memories.content: I've been learning Japanese for about eight months using Anki cards.

query.text: What language is this user learning?

cases.name: conv_reading_preference
cases.description: User's reading preference updated

memories.content: I mostly read science fiction.
I've gotten really into historical fiction lately. Hilary Mantel's Wolf Hall series is incredible.

query.text: What genre does this user like to read?

cases.name: conv_hobby_tracking
cases.description: Hobby mentioned in an early session

memories.content: I started pottery classes last year and I make bowls and mugs mostly.

query.text: Does this user have any craft hobbies?

cases.name: conv_work_style
cases.description: User's preferred work style

memories.content: I work best in deep focus blocks of 90 minutes with no interruptions. I use the Pomodoro technique adapted to longer sessions.

query.text: How does this user prefer to structure their work sessions?

cases.name: conv_health_condition
cases.description: Health information shared by user

memories.content: I have a mild lactose intolerance so I use oat milk.

query.text: Does this user have any dietary health conditions?

cases.name: conv_project_status
cases.description: Current project status after update

memories.content: The Aurora project is in early design phase.
Aurora has moved into development — we finished all the wireframes.
Aurora is now in beta testing with 200 users.

query.text: What stage is the Aurora project in?

cases.name: conv_income_absent
cases.description: Income never mentioned — must not hallucinate

memories.content: I work as a freelance designer.

query.text: How much does this user earn?

cases.name: conv_tech_stack
cases.description: User's tech stack mentioned casually

memories.content: At work we use Next.js for the frontend, FastAPI for the backend, and Postgres for the database.

query.text: What database does this user's team use?

cases.name: conv_personal_milestone
cases.description: Personal milestone mentioned once

memories.content: I just got my motorcycle licence last weekend. Really proud of that.

query.text: What did this user recently accomplish?

cases.name: conv_future_plan
cases.description: User's stated future plan

memories.content: I'm planning to move to Barcelona in September 2025 to work remotely from Spain.

query.text: Where is this user planning to move?

cases.name: conv_frustration_context
cases.description: User expressed frustration about a specific thing

memories.content: I'm really frustrated with my current IDE — VS Code keeps crashing when I open large files.

query.text: What tool is giving this user trouble?
